_meta.description: Per-layer chest loot pools. Chest SPAWN chance is computed by Constants.chest_spawn_chance(); this file controls WHAT a spawned chest contains. Upgrade Template = 10% weight within the relevant rarity pool. Loot pools are NOT terrain-specific.
_meta.status: FIRST-PASS BALANCE; rarity_weights TIGHTENED 2026-07-06 (playtest: high tiers too common early — Epic was findable in Crust). Curve pushed toward Common/Rare early. Each row still sums to 100. category_weights unchanged. Testable values pending playtesting.
_meta._balance_note: PHILOSOPHY: loot gets RARER but STRONGER deeper. Chest spawn chance already falls sharply with depth via the locked Constants.chest_spawn_chance() formula (Crust 80% -> Inner Core ~13%), so deep chests are few; their contents skew high-tier to compensate. 2026-07-06 rarity curve: Crust 88/12/0/0 (NO Epic or Legendary in Crust) · Mantle 68/27/5/0 · Outer Core 48/38/12/2 · Inner Core 22/40/30/8 · Core Hollow 0/30/52/18 (inert — no chests spawn there).
_meta._legendary_distribution_note: TENSION mostly resolved 2026-07-06: Legendary is now 0 in Crust AND Mantle, and only a lottery 2% in Outer Core — very close to the 'Legendary only appears deep' design line while preserving a tiny Outer Core jackpot. To follow the strict reading exactly, set Outer Core.Legendary to 0 and move its 2 into Epic (14) so the row still sums to 100.

Core Hollow._note: Core Hollow's design states 'no loot spawns inside it,' and ChestSpawner currently EXCLUDES Core Hollow — so this entry is inert today. It exists only so that IF Core Hollow chests are ever enabled, sensible odds already exist. Rarity here is the richest in the game (no Common at all; Legendary 30%), matching the 'rarest but strongest deepest' philosophy.
